case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE JORDAN DE ARCIA MORALES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, JOSE JORDAN DE ARCIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
